parameters.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
  v.id,
  v.name
FROM vehicles v
ORDER BY v.name;

SELECT
  v.id,
  v.name,
  v.name_full,
  v.slug,
  split_part(v.source_id, ':', 2)::int AS uex_vehicle_id,
  v.source_id,

  -- Core identity
  v.company_name,
  v.company_uex_id,
  v.scu,
  v.crew_min,
  v.crew_max,
  v.pad_type,
  v.game_version,
  v.is_spaceship,
  v.is_ground_vehicle,
  v.is_concept,
  v.is_quantum_capable,
  v.metadata->'raw'->>'container_sizes' AS container_sizes,
  v.metadata->'raw' AS raw,

  -- Some interesting flags from metadata.raw (optional, can be null)
  (v.metadata->'raw'->>'is_military')::int    AS is_military,
  (v.metadata->'raw'->>'is_civilian')::int    AS is_civilian,
  (v.metadata->'raw'->>'is_industrial')::int  AS is_industrial,
  (v.metadata->'raw'->>'is_exploration')::int AS is_exploration,
  (v.metadata->'raw'->>'is_mining')::int      AS is_mining,
  (v.metadata->'raw'->>'is_transport')::int   AS is_transport,

  /* ========== PURCHASE LOCATIONS (aUEC) ========== */

  COALESCE((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM vehicle_purchase_prices vpp
    WHERE vpp.vehicle_id = v.id
      AND vpp.price_buy > 0
  ), 0) AS purchase_count,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(
             jsonb_build_object(
               'star_system_name', vpp.star_system_name,
               'planet_name',      vpp.planet_name,
               'city_name',        vpp.city_name,
               'orbit_name',       vpp.orbit_name,
               'terminal_name',    vpp.terminal_name,
               'terminal_code',    vpp.terminal_code,
               'price_buy',        vpp.price_buy
             )
             ORDER BY
               vpp.star_system_name,
               vpp.planet_name,
               vpp.city_name,
               vpp.orbit_name,
               vpp.terminal_name
           )
    FROM vehicle_purchase_prices vpp
    WHERE vpp.vehicle_id = v.id
      AND vpp.price_buy > 0
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS purchase_points,

  /* ========== RENTAL LOCATIONS ========== */

  COALESCE((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM vehicle_rental_prices vrp
    WHERE vrp.vehicle_id = v.id
      AND vrp.price_rent > 0
  ), 0) AS rental_count,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(
             jsonb_build_object(
               'star_system_name', vrp.star_system_name,
               'planet_name',      vrp.planet_name,
               'city_name',        vrp.city_name,
               'orbit_name',       vrp.orbit_name,
               'terminal_name',    vrp.terminal_name,
               'terminal_code',    vrp.terminal_code,
               'price_rent',       vrp.price_rent
             )
             ORDER BY
               vrp.star_system_name,
               vrp.planet_name,
               vrp.city_name,
               vrp.orbit_name,
               vrp.terminal_name
           )
    FROM vehicle_rental_prices vrp
    WHERE vrp.vehicle_id = v.id
      AND vrp.price_rent > 0
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS rental_points,

  /* ========== PLEDGE STORE PRICES (USD/etc) ========== */

  COALESCE((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM vehicle_store_prices vsp
    WHERE vsp.vehicle_id = v.id
      AND COALESCE(vsp.price, 0) > 0
  ), 0) AS store_count,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(
             jsonb_build_object(
               'currency',         vsp.currency,
               'price',            vsp.price,
               'price_package',    vsp.price_package,
               'price_warbond',    vsp.price_warbond,
               'price_concierge',  vsp.price_concierge,
               'on_sale',          vsp.on_sale,
               'on_sale_package',  vsp.on_sale_package,
               'on_sale_warbond',  vsp.on_sale_warbond,
               'on_sale_concierge',vsp.on_sale_concierge,
               'game_version',     vsp.game_version
             )
             ORDER BY vsp.game_version
           )
    FROM vehicle_store_prices vsp
    WHERE vsp.vehicle_id = v.id
      AND COALESCE(vsp.price, 0) > 0
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS store_prices

FROM vehicles v
WHERE v.id = '{{$json["id"]}}';
SELECT content_hash FROM jsonkb_store WHERE entity_slug = '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.slug}}' AND entity_type = '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.entity_type}}'

INSERT INTO jsonkb_changes (entity_type, entity_id, entity_slug, jsonkb_file_path, content_hash)
VALUES (
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.entity_type}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.entity_id}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.slug}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb_file_path}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.provenance.content_hash}}'
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
